content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 BBE Marketing Inc: Business Development Manager - Latin America Anywhere in the World Texas Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0064/7908/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Hurst, TX <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bbemarketing.com/">http://bbemarketing.com/</a> </p> <p>We’re looking for a highly driven, organized, and persistent&nbsp;<strong>Business Development Manager</strong>&nbsp;to help us build and maintain relationships with representatives across the entertainment industry, including music, sports, film/TV, digital media, and more.</p> <p>This is an&nbsp;<strong>outbound-heavy role</strong>. A large part of the job involves researching contacts, sending high-quality emails, following up consistently, tracking conversations in HubSpot, and working toward clear outreach and response goals.</p> <p>We’re looking for someone who is comfortable initiating conversations, managing a large pipeline of contacts, and staying disciplined with follow-ups even when people don’t respond right away.<br><br></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Be Doing:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Manage a High Volume of Contacts:</strong>&nbsp;Oversee a large list of professional accounts, ensuring regular communication and accurate recordkeeping.</li> <li><strong>Outreach &amp; Relationship Building:</strong>&nbsp;Proactively reach out to contacts via email and social media to stay connected, share updates, and strengthen professional relationships.</li> <li><strong>Craft Well-Written Messages:</strong>&nbsp;Write polished, thoughtful emails and messages in English—clear, natural communication is key.</li> <li><strong>Track Progress:</strong>&nbsp;Use tools like&nbsp;<strong>HubSpot</strong>&nbsp;to manage follow-ups, keep conversations organized, and hit relationship-building goals.</li> <li><strong>Work Toward Clear Targets:</strong>&nbsp;While there’s no selling involved, this role does have measurable outreach and engagement goals.</li> <li><strong>Think Creatively:</strong>&nbsp;Develop new approaches for keeping relationships active, warm, and productive over time.<br><br></li> </ul> <p><strong>Who We’re Looking For:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Excellent written English and Spanish</strong>—you’re comfortable writing professional messages and outreach emails with clarity and polish.</li> <li><strong>Extremely organized</strong>—you can juggle many accounts and keep your outreach and follow-ups on track.</li> <li><strong>Self-motivated and driven</strong>—you take initiative, meet goals, and stay focused without constant supervision.</li> <li><strong>Relationship-minded</strong>—you enjoy connecting with people and maintaining positive, long-term communication.</li> <li>Familiarity with CRM tools like&nbsp;<strong>HubSpot</strong>&nbsp;is a plus.</li> <li>A genuine&nbsp;<strong>interest in the entertainment industry</strong>—especially music, sports, film/TV, or digital media—will help you succeed in this role.</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bbe-marketing-inc-business-development-manager-latin-america">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bbe-marketing-inc-business-development-manager-latin-america</a></p> https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bbe-marketing-inc-business-development-manager-latin-america Bright! Tax: Client Success Lead Anywhere in the World 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇲🇽 Mexico, and 🇺🇸 United States of America New York Customer Support Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5806/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://brighttax.com">http://brighttax.com</a> </p> <p>About the role</p> <p><br><br></p> <p>This is a player-coach role. You will lead a small pod of four to five Client Success Managers — coaching them, developing them, and owning your pod’s client retention and satisfaction — while carrying a focused personal portfolio of your own so you stay close to the work and lead by example. It is the bridge between frontline client care and the leadership of the function, reporting to the Director of Client Success.</p> <p>You are not stepping back from clients to manage from a distance. You are the person your team turns to first, the calm hand on the hardest situations, and a working example of what great looks like.</p> <p><br><br></p> <p>What you’ll do<br><br></p> <ul> <li>Lead a pod of 4–5 CSMs —&nbsp;regular 1:1s, coaching, development conversations, and day-to-day support that helps each person grow toward full independence.</li> <li>Own&nbsp; your pod's performance —&nbsp;Client retention, CSAT, Revenue and each CSM's progress. Report on it regularly, flagging what's working and what needs attention before it becomes a problem</li> <li>Carry a focused personal portfolio —&nbsp;a reduced book of your own, managed to the same high standard you coach your team to.</li> <li>Be the first escalation point —&nbsp;resolve complex or sensitive client situations within the pod before they need to go further.</li> <li>Onboard and develop new CSMs —&nbsp;give new joiners a warm, structured start and a clear path to confidence.</li> <li>Partner with the Director —&nbsp;on capacity, process improvements, and the patterns you see across your pod.</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p>What success looks like</p> <p><br><br></p> <p>Your clients renew because they feel genuinely known and well looked after. Your CSMs are growing, ramping on schedule, and reaching out to you — not the Director — when they need help. Problems surface early and get solved calmly. The people on your team would tell you it’s the best-supported they’ve felt at work.</p> <p><br><br></p> <p>What we’re looking for</p> <p><br><br></p> <ul> <li>Four or more years in client success, account management, or client-facing delivery — ideally in a service, professional-services, or finance environment.</li> <li>Experience leading, coaching, or mentoring others — whether as a formal manager or a strong informal leader ready to step into the role.</li> <li>A track record of keeping clients and growing relationships, with a real sense of ownership over retention.</li> <li>Excellent written communication and genuine warmth — you make people feel looked after in every interaction.</li> <li>Comfort working with a
